title: QR Code Settings
description: Settings for QR code generation and validation

qrCodeExpirationMinutes.title: QR Code Expiration Minutes
qrCodeExpirationMinutes.description: The number of minutes before a generated QR code expires. The default is set to 60 minutes (1 hour).

enableQrCodeStoreValidation.title: Enable QR Code Store Validation
enableQrCodeStoreValidation.description: When set to true, validates that the store ID in the QR code generation request matches the authenticated business unit.

enableQrCodeExpirationValidation.title: Enable QR Code Expiration Validation
enableQrCodeExpirationValidation.description: When set to true, validates that the QR code has not expired during validation requests.
